chunks.text:
Key attributes and experiences of cyberbullying among children in the UK
Key attributes and experiences of cyberbullying among children in the UK
Online safety
Protecting children
Research, statistics and data
Published:
15 March 2024
This research explores the pathways through which children are exposed to cyberbullying, the impact this can have, and perceptions of what works to address cyberbullying. It also explored what cyberbullying looks like among children, which was said to happen anywhere children interacted online and tended to concentrate on whichever platforms were most popular at the time.
